snippet.title: Massacre Song | Music Video | ALPHA | Alia Bhatt, Sharvari | Rohansh & Abeer, Shilpa, Jonita, Kausar
snippet.description:
Two deadly girls, one banger music video. Presenting #Massacre - the music video! 🔥🔥🔥

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is in theatres worldwide now.

Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!

About YRF Spy Universe: 
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, released on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Age of Umbra: Sallowlands | Official Trailer | A Daggerheart Miniseries
snippet.description:
The Sallowlands beckon—immerse yourself into the world and characters of this new Daggerheart mini-series premiering July 9th! Rumors swirl of a gargantuan metropolis appearing suddenly, deep in the cracked ancient lakebed of the Sallowlands. Five survivors hope that finding it will give them what they each desperately need.

AGE OF UMBRA: SALLOWLANDS

snippet.title: Dinosaurs of the Wild West | Official Kickstarter Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Worldwide Pre-Order on Kickstarter Now: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/sparkefilms/dinosaurs-of-the-wild-west-series

From the creative team behind the 2025 cult-dinosaur feature PRIMITIVE WAR comes an ambitious new original cinematic universe: DINOSAURS OF THE WILD WEST.

In an alternate frontier, humanity navigates a dangerous land where every journey, every town, and every war depends on the giant creatures that shaped civilization itself. Dinosaurs of the Wild West is an epic adventure series that reimagines the American frontier through a world millions of years in the making.

Massive Brontosaurs haul entire towns across the frontier.
Raptors are ridden into battle.
Pterosaurs rule the skies.

For generations, humans and dinosaurs shaped the world together.
Now something is coming that threatens to change that forever.

Narrated by actor Jesse Kove. Inspired by the illustrated world of creator Shaun Keenan. 

Alongside the full trailer, DINOSAURS OF THE WILD WEST Kickstarter campaign unveils  a mix of EARLY BIRD and LIMITED EDITION rewards that include:
 VIP ON SET EXPERIENCES
 FIRST EDITION TRADING CARD SET
 BEHIND THE SCENES ACCESS
 ASSOCIATE PRODUCER CREDITS
 And the opportunity to CREATE A DINOSAUR for the series.

Stretch goals for the campaign include expanded creature sequences, additional cinematic set pieces, major guest appearances, and the unlocking of future episodes. 

Currently the ONLY way to watch is to pre order the series through kickstarter. 

ABOUT THE PROJECT
Dinosaurs of the Wild West is an original cinematic universe created by filmmaker Luke Sparke and developed alongside a team of artists and visual effects talent behind Primitive War and multiple internationally released feature films. It’s produced by Carmel Imrie, Carly Sparke and Luke Sparke with Executive Producers Geoff Imrie, Eric Weick, Colin Hurdle, Kelly Clifford, Luke Sparke

The two promos were completed in house by Luke Sparke, Sparke Films, Let It Be Entertainment and Sparke Effects including VFX artists Vivian David, Jared Johnson, Mark Griffiths, Julien Romeo, Felipe Gonzalez, Evan Robinson, Alejandro Agudelo and in conjunction with Kubo vfx studio. VFX Supervison by Luke Sparke, Post Produced by Carly Sparke, Executive Creative Brooke Marsden and original score by Frederik Wiedmann.

Instagram:  @dinosaursofthewildwesttv & @primitivewarmovieofficial  
TikTok: @primitivewarmovie
Facebook:  @primitivewarmovie
Official Site: DOTWW.com

snippet.title: Tabaahi 🔥| Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Kiara Advani, Tara Sutaria| Vishal Mishra, Raj Shekhar
snippet.description:
Tabaahi ❤️✨ — a melody that speaks straight to the heart.

Featuring Yash and Kiara Advani, this soulful track is beautifully sung and composed by Vishal Mishra. Let its heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing melody stay with you long after the music ends. 🎶

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Tabaahi
Movie: Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups
Vocal & Composition: Vishal Mishra
Lyrics: Raj Shekhar
Music Assistants: Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah & Kandarpa Kalita
Music Production: Vishal Mishra, Bitupon Boruah, Kandarpa Kalita & Trihangku Lahkar
Guitars: Kandarpa Kalita
Drums: Trihangku Lahkar
Synths: Kandarpa Kalita & Bitupon Boruah
Backing Vocals: Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah & Trihangku Lahkar
Brass & Woodwinds Arranged by: Vishal Mishra 
Dubbed in Prague by: Steve Ferry 
Vocal Dub Coordinator: Santhosh Venky
Recorded, Mixed & Mastered by: Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

Lyrics:
तोड़ो, सारे उसूलों को
छोड़ो, जाने दो भूलो को
तू हो बाहों में Aur  हर जगह तबाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Todo, Saare Usoolon Ko
Chhodo, Jaane Do Bhoolo Ko
Tu Ho Baahon Mein Aur Har Jagah Tabaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

ये लहर, ये हवा
कब चली पूछ के
रूह पे, क्यूँ भला
हो कोई बंदिशें
दुनिया के दस्तूर से आज ले रिहाई
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Yeh Lahar, Yeh Hawaa
Kab Chali Poochke
Rooh Pe, Kyun Bhala
Ho Koi Bandishein
Duniya Ke Dastoor Se Aaj Le Rihaayii
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

तू मुझे छील दे सांस की आग से
हर धड़क पे दोनो हो फना राख से
हर गलत सही-रेत पे लिखी गवाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही

Tu Mujhe Chheel De, Saans Ki Aag Se
Har Dhadak Pe Dono Ho Fana Raakh Se
Har Galat Sahi- Ret Pe Likhi Gawaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

#Tabaahi #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #KiaraAdvani

snippet.title: LES MISÉRABLES | Official Teaser Trailer | STUDIOCANAL
snippet.description:
Witness an epic new take on Victor Hugo's timeless classic in LES MISÉRABLES. 
 
A film by Fred Cavayé, starring Vincent Lindon, Tahar Rahim, Camille Cottin, Benjamin Lavernhe, Noémie Merlant, Vassili Schneider, Megan Northam, Marie Colomb and Louis Peres.
 
In cinemas across France October 14 and coming soon internationally.

#LesMiserables #VincentLindon #TaharRahim 

After enduring 19 years in prison for stealing a loaf of bread, Jean Valjean emerges a hardened man. He seeks redemption by reinventing himself as a respected dignitary under a new identity. He promises Fantine, a dying factory worker, to rescue and protect her daughter Cosette, who is being exploited and mistreated by the deceitful Thénardier family. As Valjean raises Cosette as his own, he is relentlessly pursued by Inspector Javert. Admist the social unrest shaking France, the fates of Valjean, Cosette, her lover Marius, and Javert become intertwined in a turbulent, revolutionary Paris. Through struggles, sacrifices, and a deep yearning for justice, Valjean strives to complete his journey of redemption and offer Cosette a future of love and freedom. 

Find out more at http://www.studiocanal.com 🎥

STUDIOCANAL is Europe’s leading movie & television studio with one of the world’s largest film libraries. The official STUDIOCANAL YouTube channel showcases the latest trailers for upcoming releases + clips and exclusive content from our extensive and celebrated library. Enjoy - and subscribe for more!

snippet.title: Chronicles: Medieval - Official Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Chronicles: Medieval puts you at the center of a vast medieval sandbox, where the battles you fight, the army you build, and the decisions you make are what shape the course of your journey.

Combat is at the heart of it. Hundreds of soldiers clash around you, banners against banners, steel against steel. You command your troops in real time while fighting alongside them, rising from an unknown soldier to someone this era will remember.

Wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2231020/Chronicles_Medieval/

Developer: Raw Power Games
X: https://x.com/Chronicles1313
